title: trichonema quadrangulum
intro: Trichonema quadrangulum, also known as Quadrangular Acanthus or Four-angled Trichonema, is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including relieving congestion and soothing sore throats. Trichonema quadrangulum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and in some cases, used as a topical application for skin irritations and wounds.
